summary: Good sound quality captures an exciting Fire transition that gives the show a fresh twist
review: The reviewer praises the set for its surprising song selection and the goose‑bumps‑inducing transition into "Fire," noting it feels like a first‑time outing. They also comment that this tape sounds better than other versions they own, making it an appealing listen despite limited detail on the recording source.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) that is generally positive about both performance and sound quality; insufficient data for higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says this version has better sound quality than other tapes they own, implying a clear and listenable recording.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set features an unexpected song change that catches listeners off‑guard, highlighted by a thrilling transition into "Fire" that adds excitement to the performance.
